final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of a 元宵灯会 in 唐代长安城.

Style/medium: needs a 工笔重彩长卷 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide horizontal scroll (长卷) panoramic format
Subject: must include thousands of 花灯 (万盏) illuminating the night sky, crowds celebrating in 长安城
Scene/backdrop: must include 唐代长安城 at night during 元宵灯会
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, lantern-lit night atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, vibrant 重彩 direction — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a 工笔 fine-line brushwork surface treatment — exact ink weight and silk/paper texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
